# Smart-UI — AI Automation & Software Development Agency
> B2B software studio (Spain HQ, Ukraine dev centre) serving clients in the UK, EU, US, and Australia since 2018. 315+ delivered projects. Specialising in AI agents, workflow automation, and full-stack web development for SMEs and scale-ups.

## Core Services
- [AI Automation & Custom AI Agents](https://www.smart-ui.pro/en/ai-automation): custom LLM agents, n8n workflow automation, RAG document systems, AI copilots, lead qualification bots. Pilots from £2,500 delivered in 2–4 weeks.
- [Backend Development](https://www.smart-ui.pro/en/backend-development): Node.js, NestJS, Python, Django, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
- [Frontend Development](https://www.smart-ui.pro/en/frontend-development): React, Next.js, TypeScript, Vue.js — pixel-perfect, performant
- [UI/UX Design](https://www.smart-ui.pro/en/ui-ux-design): product design, prototyping, Figma
- [QA Engineering](https://www.smart-ui.pro/en/qa): manual, automated, and security testing
- [CMS Solutions](https://www.smart-ui.pro/en/cms): Strapi, WordPress, headless CMS
- [Custom Services](https://www.smart-ui.pro/en/custom-service): email templates, maintenance, performance, redesign

## UK Clients & Experience
- Serving UK companies since 2018 — finance, SaaS, automotive analytics, e-commerce
- English-native communication; working hours overlap with GMT
- Familiar with UK business culture and compliance requirements

## Why Smart-UI for UK Companies
- Fixed-price AI Process Audit (delivered in 1 week) — low-risk entry point
- Proven pilots: 2–4 week delivery, then scale
- Tech stack: Python, FastAPI, Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, n8n, Next.js, Node.js, Docker
